title: How governing your morning governs everything else
caption:
The first hour of your day is a contract with the rest of it.

Most men sign it over to their phone without thinking — notifications before prayer, screens before silence, everyone else's agenda before their own.

Start with God before you start your day. Move your body before you move your schedule. Protect the quiet — it's where direction gets found. And carry what you built in the morning into everything that follows.

You're not building a perfect routine. You're building the habit of governing yourself before the world gets to you.

Save this for the man who's been meaning to change his mornings.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #disciplineequalsfreedom #routine
